# TSP-MTZ test instances for LP racing correctness tests
# Generated by test_racing_lp.cpp using rand() with specified seeds.
# LP bounds verified with both normal OsiClp initialSolve and racing mode.
#
# Format: asymmetric distance matrix, c[i][j] = 1 + (rand() % 100)
# LP relaxation solved with ClpSolve (dual + presolve).
#
# Instance    n   seed   LP_bound (optimal)
# TSP-MTZ-20  20  42     172.283333
# TSP-MTZ-40  40  123    189.000000
# TSP-MTZ-60  60  7      197.116667
#
# To regenerate distances: srand(seed); for i,j (i!=j): c[i][j] = 1 + rand()%100
#
# These instances are used in Clp/test/test_racing_lp.cpp to verify that:
# 1. Normal OsiClp initialSolve produces the correct LP bound
# 2. Racing mode (setRacingLP(2)) produces the same LP bound
# 3. Both modes correctly report optimal status
#
# Additional test cases in test_racing_lp.cpp:
#
# UFL (Uncapacitated Facility Location) instances:
# Fixed costs f[i] = 50 + rand()%101, service costs c[i][j] = 1 + rand()%50
#
# Instance      n_fac  n_cli  seed   LP_bound
# UFL-10x30     10     30     99     560.000000
# UFL-20x60     20     60     77     770.500000
# UFL-30x100    30     100    55     1040.962000
# UFL-50x200    50     200    33     1433.051600
#
# Instance         n     Expected status   Expected obj
# NQueens-8        8     Optimal           -8.0
# NQueens-20       20    Optimal           -20.0
# NQueens-50       50    Optimal           -50.0
# NQueens-100      100   Optimal           -100.0
# Infeasible-10    10    Infeasible        N/A
# Infeasible-50    50    Infeasible        N/A
# Infeasible-200   200   Infeasible        N/A
# Unbounded-10     10    Unbounded         N/A
# Unbounded-50     50    Unbounded         N/A
